title: Seer (fixture)
content:
The Seer is the Sequence 9 of the Fool pathway. A Seer gains rudimentary divination abilities, including augury and dream interpretation.
Abilities.
Spirit vision at close range
Pendulum dowsing
Augury performed with a tarot deck
Digestion.
Newly advanced Seers are advised to act out the potion’s role before any further advancement. Failure to control the corresponding desires may lead to loss of control.

title: Tingen (fixture)
content:
Tingen is a city in the Loen Kingdom, known for its fog and its chapels. The city hosts a branch of the Nighthawks, who police the supernatural.
Its streets run down to a slow canal.
